reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 1 triggered: dead/unreachable code. The function for_eth_next_block (and its internal call path to for_eth_next) has zero non-test callers in the target repository (grep results show only the definition at env.rs:41). The bug at line 124 (next_block_excess_blob_gas_osaka receiving input.base_fee_per_gas instead of parent's base fee) exists in code that is currently unreachable on a live network. Note: This is a public API in a library crate that could potentially be called by external consumers, but no such usage exists in the audited codebase.
